urdu transliteration text:
LEKE ALAM TUM AAWO ALAMDAARTake the flag and come O’ flag bearerEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

LEKE ALAM TUM AAWO ALAMDAARMASHK BHAR KE TUM LAAWO ALAMDAAR
O’ flag bearer,
O’ flag bearer
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Take the flag and come
Fill the Mashk and bring it

urdu transliteration text:
EK TARAF HAA-E KHAIMEN HAI JALTENANHE BACHCHE HAI PAANI KO TARASTEAA KE INHE TUM PAANI PILAAWOMASHK BHAR KE TUM LAAWO ALAMDAAR
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
On one side the tents are burning,
The young children are thirsting for water,
Come and give them water
Fill the Mashk and bring it O’ flag bearer

urdu transliteration text:
BHAAI ZARAA TUM KHAIMEN ME AAWOROT-E HAI BACHCHE AA KE MANAWOCHHOTI SAKINAA KO MUNH TO DIKHAA-OMASHK BHAR KE TUM LAAWO ALAMDAAR
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O brother Abbas (a.s.) come to the tents,
The children are crying, come comfort them,
At least show your face to young Sakina,
Fill the Mashk and come O’ flag bearer

urdu transliteration text:
PYAARI SAKINAA DHUNDH RAHI HAIHAA-E MACHAL KE KEH RAHI HAIMUJH KO MILAA DO APNE CHACHAA SEMASHK BHAR KE TUM LAAWO ALAMDAAR
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Beloved Sakina is looking for you,
She is in pain and calling out,
‘Bring my uncle to me’,
Fill the Mashk and come O’ flag bearer

urdu transliteration text:
AB TO YAQIN HAI CHAADAR CHHINEN GIBALWE MEN KHUL-E SAR HAA-E PHIREN GIKHULD MEN BAA BAA HAMKO BULAA LOMASHK BHAR KE TUM LAAWO ALAMDAAR
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Now we are sure our veil will be stolen,
In this desert we will be forced to move without our heads covered,
Call us towards you O’ father,
Fill the Mashk and come O’ flag bearer

urdu transliteration text:
ROT-E HAI BHAAI NEHR PE BAITHELAASH-E KE QARIB PUSHT KO PAKD-ESAMJAA KE UNKO KHIMEN ME LAA-O MASHK BHAR KE TUM LAAWO ALAMDAAR
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Our brother is crying near the river,
He is near your body holding his back,
Comfort him and bring him to the tents,
Fill the Mashk and come O’ flag bearer

urdu transliteration text:
AB NA RAHAA HAI KOI MADAD GAARTUM BHI CHAL BAS-E HAA-E ALAMDAARNAJAF SE TUM BAA BAA KO BULAA LOMASHK BHAR KE TUM LAAWO ALAMDAAR
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Now there is no one left to help us,
You also left us O’ flag bearer,
Call our father from Najaf,
Fill the Mashk and come O’ flag bearer
